eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Washington; at 8:53 AM on JUN 16, 2026 Effective until 9:53 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Washington State Patrol on behalf of the Snohomish County Sheriff's Office has canceled the Amber Alert for 6 year old Eliab Carreno Carreno. He has been located.
